name: Van McCoy
abstract: Van Allen Clinton McCoy (January 6, 1940 – July 6, 1979) was an American record producer, arranger, songwriter and singer. He is known for his 1975 internationally successful hit "The Hustle".

about_quotes.speaker: David Spinozza
about_quotes.evidence: Van was so specific with his charts... you just read the charts... you had to just play every part
about_quotes.doc_title: David Spinozza interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, NY, September 27, 2025
